name: Blue Ridge Bank And Trust Co.
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering checking, savings, CDs, auto loans, mortgages, and treasury services for personal and business customers since 1958.
description_long:
Blue Ridge Bank and Trust Co. has operated since 1958 as a full-service financial institution providing banking and trust services to both individual and business customers. The bank is FDIC-insured and backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, offering foundational deposit protection for customer accounts.

The bank's product portfolio includes personal banking services (MY Checking, FREE Checking, savings accounts, CDs), lending products (auto loans, mortgages), and specialized business services. They offer digital banking capabilities, debit and credit cards, online account opening, wealth management, retirement planning, and investments. For business customers, Blue Ridge provides comprehensive treasury services including ACH collections, ACH payments, direct deposit, ACH block/filter services, and positive pay capabilities. Their online cash management system allows businesses to create or upload ACH-formatted files for streamlined processing.

The bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on no-fee checking accounts, competitive CD rates, and personalized treasury services with dedicated associates. They target both everyday consumers seeking fee-free banking and business clients requiring cash flow management solutions. The website emphasizes their long operational history and mission to "enable people to acquire financial resources to realize their dreams."

As a traditional regional bank, Blue Ridge provides standard banking services without the innovation of fintech platforms, but offers relationship-based service through named treasury associates and personalized financial planning. The website content is functional but limited in detail about rates, terms, or specific product features, requiring customers to contact the bank directly for comprehensive pricing and application information. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mortgage loans (home purchase and refinance implied)
Online cash management system for business clients
pros: FDIC-insured deposits with full U.S. Government backing
NO monthly fees on FREE Checking account option
MY Checking offers higher interest rates on deposits
Online account opening available for quick setup
Dedicated Treasury Services associates for business clients
Comprehensive ACH services including collections and positive pay fraud prevention
Long operational history since 1958 demonstrates stability
cons: Website provides limited detail on interest rates, APYs, or specific loan terms—customers must contact bank directly
No mention of mobile app features or mobile banking capabilities despite digital banking offering
Treasury services appear business-focused; limited information on personal investment and wealth management details
No pricing information provided for various products, making cost comparison difficult
Limited online product comparison tools or rate calculators visible on homepage
best_for: Small to mid-sized business owners needing ACH processing and cash flow management
Consumers seeking fee-free checking with no monthly maintenance charges
Individuals interested in relationship-based banking with named financial advisors
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and traditional bank stability over digital-first banking
diagnosis: Blue Ridge Bank and Trust Co. is best for traditional consumers and business owners seeking FDIC-insured banking with relationship-based service and no-fee checking options, as well as small businesses requiring treasury and ACH management tools. The main caveat is that the website lacks transparent pricing, rate information, and detailed product specifications—prospective customers must contact the bank directly to compare terms and apply, and there is no indication of competitive rates or online self-service tools typical of modern digital banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: Blue Ridge Bank and Trust Co.
